title: transactional-email-v1
description: Transactional email service contract v1 — 19 operations across sending, contacts, broadcasts, templates, domains, and webhooks.

operations.name: send
operations.description: Send an email (HTML/text, attachments, scheduled, idempotent)

operations.name: get_email
operations.description: Retrieve a sent email by ID with delivery status

operations.name: list_emails
operations.description: List sent emails with status filters

operations.name: list_domains
operations.description: List sending domains with verification status

operations.name: get_domain
operations.description: Get domain detail with DNS record requirements

operations.name: get_template
operations.description: Get template with HTML content and variables

operations.name: send_batch
operations.description: Batch send up to 100 emails in a single request

operations.name: list_webhooks
operations.description: List webhook endpoints for delivery events

operations.name: cancel_scheduled
operations.description: Cancel a scheduled email before delivery

operations.name: create_contact
operations.description: Create a contact with properties in an audience

operations.name: create_broadcast
operations.description: Create a broadcast draft for an audience segment

operations.name: send_broadcast
operations.description: Send or schedule a draft broadcast

operations.name: create_template
operations.description: Create an email template with variables

operations.name: add_domain
operations.description: Register a sending domain (returns DNS records for verification)
